_note: Oracle vectors. Wire-format byte alignment (Elsys typed-TLV) is taken from reference/upstream-codec.js (DecodeElsysPayload); expected.data is the authored normalization to the shared vocabulary (action.contactState for the reed/door switch, action.motion for the accelerometer movement count). Vector 1 uses the upstream TTN example input (ACC + PULSE1 + PULSE1_ABS -> extras only, no door/motion fields present in that capture). Vectors 2-3 are synthetic door + motion captures; vectors 4-5 are error inputs.

uplink.description: EMS Door accelerometer (raw X/Y/Z) and pulse counters -> extras only
Door open (reed digital=1) with 3 movement events
Door closed (reed digital=0) with no movement
Unrecognized leading type byte -> no recognized fields
